ns0:entry.ns0:title: Leantime/leantime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Leantime/leantime
Language: php
Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PHPMailer/PHPMailer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PHPMailer/PHPMailer
Language: php
The classic email sending library for PHP

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RSS-Bridge/rss-bridge
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RSS-Bridge/rss-bridge
Language: php
The RSS feed for websites missing it

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SpartnerNL/Laravel-Excel

Language: php

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/ai
Language: php
AI features and experiments for WordPress. Modular framework for testing AI capabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firefly-iii/firefly-iii
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firefly-iii/firefly-iii
Language: php

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glpi-project/glpi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi
Language: php
GLPI is a Free Asset and IT Management Software package, Data center management, ITIL Service Desk, licenses tracking and software auditing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grokability/snipe-it
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it
Language: php
A free open source IT asset/license management system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kimai/kimai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kimai/kimai
Language: php
Kimai is the #1 open-source time-tracking application. From freelancers to companies and organisations - everyone can manage timesheets, generate reports, create invoices and so much more... Web-based multi-user application, available as On-Premise or SaaS version: https://www.kimai.org

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/ai
Language: php
The Laravel AI SDK provides a unified, expressive API for interacting with AI providers such as OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/framework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/framework
Language: php
Laravel is a web application framework with expressive, elegant syntax.
